premiumRequests.note: Implementation completed in 1 premium request with zero compilation errors. However, 2 latent bugs (missing castSpell() in total-cover early return, missing null guards on map/position data) passed all tests and were not discovered during the session. These would have required additional premium requests to diagnose and fix if discovered through later integration testing or play testing.

notes: Single-agent (default Copilot agent) completed all 4 tasks from the spec. The agent also modified spell-action-handler.ts which was in the 'Files to Read' scope but not 'Files to Modify' — however this was a necessary design decision since the cover check for DEX saves needs to happen at the spell-handler level. 1 rework cycle: the response message format in spell-action-handler.ts was edited twice (first in the batch edit, then a follow-up replace to add cover note to the message). 14 terminal runs includes several retries to capture E2E output (truncation issues with PowerShell output buffering). The task-spec markdown edit was undone by the user (not counted as a source file modification).
